infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 22 - 24 May 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:40, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Audi Revolut F1 Team Document 72 Date 23 May 2026 Time 16:46 No / Driver 27 - Nico Hulk

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:40, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Audi Revolut F1 Team
Document 72
Date 23 May 2026
Time 16:46
No / Driver 27 - Nico Hulkenberg
Reason Alleged breach of Article B4.1.1 of the FIA F1 Regulations – Car 18 allegedly
impeding Car 27 in turn 5 at 16:17.
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers
